selected_style.name: Swiss Utility
selected_style.description: Restrained grid-first interface style for products that must be scanned, compared, and used repeatedly.
avoid_for: brand landing pages needing strong emotional recall

tokens.typography: Inter or system sans; tabular numbers for metrics
tokens.layout: 12-column grid, tight section hierarchy, strong table and form rhythm

quality_gates: Can a repeated user complete the top task without reading decorative copy?
Do tables, filters, and actions stay aligned at desktop and laptop widths?
Are accent colors reserved for state and action instead of decoration?

backup_styles.name: Refined SaaS
backup_styles.description: Quiet, polished SaaS style with stronger brand signal than pure utility while keeping work surfaces usable.
avoid_for: high-risk financial operations where decorative visuals reduce trust
mobile-first consumer apps needing playful identity

backup_styles.name: AI Lab Dark
backup_styles.description: Technical dark interface for model routing, evaluation, observability, and AI operations.

backup_styles.name: Data Newsroom
backup_styles.description: Analytical editorial style for explaining metrics, market movement, and research findings.

next_steps: Review whether the selected style matches the product task and target users.
Approve or override the style before generating high-fidelity UI.
Use the selected tokens and quality gates during screenshot review.
